sourceRef: tip:Tracking program changes without losing your mind

slides.headline: Track Changes Without Losing Your Mind
slides.body: Stay on top of program updates and avoid certification chaos.

slides.headline: Create a Certification Version Control System
slides.body: Use a spreadsheet to track changes in your certifications.
bullets: List each certification in a column

slides.headline: Utilize the Yellow Ribbon Program
slides.body: Stay informed of Yellow Ribbon Program changes with regular updates.
bullets: Subscribe to the Yellow Ribbon Program newsletter
Review the latest SAA letter on Yellow Ribbon

slides.headline: Review 22-1999 and Chapter 33
slides.body: Understand key forms and regulations for your certifications.
bullets: Stay updated on the latest SAA letter

slides.headline: Implement a Regular Review Process
slides.body: Schedule bi-weekly reviews of your certification documents.
bullets: Set up a recurring calendar event

slides.headline: Maintain a Compliance Log
slides.body: Keep a record of all relevant updates and decisions.
bullets: Include all relevant dates and sources

slides.body: Ready to start versioning your certifications? Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay organized and informed with these steps to track program changes and avoid certification confusion. Ready to get started? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, which could benefit from a more concise headline to better align with the other steps.
